benefits.description: Hoping to increase deep sleep duration from ~45 minutes average

protocol_notes: 19-year-old planning to start ipamorelin primarily to improve deep sleep. Currently averaging ~45 min deep sleep despite healthy lifestyle, glycine and magnesium supplementation, whole foods diet, and good sleep hygiene. Chose ipamorelin as perceived safest/mildest GH secretagogue. Post is pre-use inquiry, not a usage report.
